productDisplayName: Nike Men's As Miler UV SS Orange T-shirt
description: CompositionBright orange round neck t-shirt made of 100% recycled polyester, engineered with Dri-Fit technology and UPF 30, has short sleeves with nike swoosh in silver print on left chest FittingComfortWash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not use softeners or bleach Tumble dry low Remove immediately/do not allow fabric to lie on itself when wet Cool iron, but do not iron on design Do not dry clean Designed for that absolute running experience, this nike t-shirt is replete with Dri-Fit comfort to make your sporting experience all the more comfortable and fun. The Dri-Fit technology wicks away sweat, allowing you to concentrate on your running, while the UPF 30 protects you from harmful ultra-violet rays. Team this with performance shorts and running shoes for that complete running comfort.
